name: Orange-Jicama Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear the butter lettuce leaves and place them on plates.
2. Top with orange slices.
3. Create a mound of jicama julienne on top of the oranges.
4. Sprinkle chopped red onion over the salad.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together orange juice, white wine vinegar, salt, pepper, and cilantro until well combined.
6. Slowly add olive oil to the dressing while continuously whisking until emulsified.
7. Drizzle the dressing over the salads.
8. Garnish with additional minced cilantro before serving.
